_comment: Consumer binding emitted from 30-task.yaml per references/output-formats.md. One tool per LEAF L2 task; ExtractOntology is orchestration (has decomposes_to) so it is NOT a tool. Preconditions/effects are folded into each description so the operating agent reads them before calling.

tools.name: scaffold_workspace
tools.description: Create the canonical 7-file ontology workspace (00-scope.md … 50-mappings.yaml + README). Precondition: a target name is given. Effect: files written from templates. Output: Ontology (L1).

tools.name: scope_target
tools.description: Establish target (research vs retrofit), consumer, and boundary. Precondition: consumer is chosen — it determines depth and output format. Effect: 00-scope.md target/consumer/boundary populated.

target.description: ExtractionTarget (L1) — a company/API/market or a codebase

boundary.description: what is explicitly in and out of scope

tools.name: write_competency_questions
tools.description: Write 5–15 questions per layer the finished ontology must answer using only its own terms. Effect: CQs recorded in 00-scope.md; they define done. Output: CompetencyQuestion (L1).

tools.name: mine_sources
tools.description: Harvest evidence from the target's artifacts and map each to a layer. Precondition: boundary is set so mining doesn't boil the ocean. Effect: candidate terms collected, each with a source pointer. Output: EvidenceSource (L1).

tools.name: anchor_upper
tools.description: Select an upper ontology and pin 10–25 anchor categories. Precondition: do NOT invent L0 — select from a published standard (gist | bfo+cco | schema.org | dolce | sumo). Effect: 10-upper.yaml records ontology, version, anchor IRIs. Output: UpperOntology (L1).

tools.name: build_domain_layer
tools.description: Build domain classes and relations from mined evidence. Preconditions: synonyms collapsed to one canonical id; every class anchored to an upper category. Effect: 20-domain.yaml populated; a class list with no relations is rejected as a taxonomy. Outputs: OntologyClass, Relation (L1).

tools.name: build_task_layer
tools.description: Define task/workflow activities with IOPE (inputs, outputs, preconditions, effects), referencing domain nouns. Precondition: domain classes exist to serve as inputs/outputs/roles. Effect: 30-task.yaml populated. Output: OntologyTask (L1/L2).

tools.name: project_application_layer
tools.description: Bind the system's concrete artifacts (db tables, api types, tool schemas, events, ui objects) to domain classes and tasks. Precondition: L1 and L2 exist to bind upward. Effect: 40-application.yaml populated; unbindable artifacts flagged as dead schema. Output: ApplicationConcept (L3).

tools.name: validate_ontology
tools.description: Check structure, answer every competency question, and round-trip real records. Precondition: all four layers populated. Effects: unanchored classes, dangling refs, duplicate ids, and orphans reported; NONZERO ERRORS → exit 1 (build fails). Run this BEFORE emitting any binding.

tools.name: generate_mappings
tools.description: Regenerate the app→domain→upper mapping table from the layers. Precondition: application concepts bind to known domain classes. Effect: 50-mappings.yaml written. Output: Mapping (L1).

tools.name: emit_consumer_binding
tools.description: Emit the consumer-specific output (MCP tool JSON, Turtle/RDF, JSON-LD context, TS/Pydantic types, RAG metadata, or Mermaid). PRECONDITION: validation passes — emit AFTER validation, never before. Output: ConsumerBinding (L1).
